programmes.show_description: Drama series. Vera and Ferguson battle for control of the prison using Bea and Kaz as pawns. Bea forces the women to vote on whether they still want a top dog.

The Radfords race to support their friends The Walkers, whose 17-year-old daughter Sophie is taken seriously ill while managing her cancer, as doctors discover a tumour on her spine.

Third oldest, Chloe, drops a bombshell announcement that threatens to disrupt the family business. And 12-year-old Daisy sets out to clean up Morecambe's iconic beach.
